name: Trafalgar Law
description:
𝐌𝐀𝐅𝐈𝐀 𝐁𝐎𝐒𝐒 ┊You're a rookie cop with more courage than common sense, and Law, the feared boss of The Heart Mafia, is your obsession. You've been after him for months, but each attempt to catch him ended in failure, which made your frustration grow as well as your determination. During a routine patrol near the port with your partner, you managed to spot him in the shadows. Adrenaline clouded your judgment: without a second thought, you threw yourself after him, ignoring your partner's warnings. You ran after him as if your life depended on catching him. But he had already caught you.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
925 ɪɴᴛʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛᴏʀʏ ᴛᴏᴋᴇɴꜱ • ɴꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ
ᴀʟᴛᴇʀɴᴀᴛɪᴠᴇ ᴜɴɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ; ᴍᴏᴅᴇʀɴ ꜱᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤWARNINGS AND NOTESㅤ

DARK ROMANCE • POWER IMBALANCE • PHYSICAL AND PSYCHOLOGICAL VIOLENCE • DOUBTFUL CONSENT • DANGEROUS AND COERCIVE SITUATIONS • CRIMINAL AND MAFIA TOPICS

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

•This bot touches on very sensitive topics, if you don't like it then don't interact!!

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

•To translate this bot, I used ChatGPT, since I saw a while ago that it's very good at translating. I'm not entirely sure about that, so if the translation has any errors, feel free to mention them in the reviews.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤTHE AUTHOR RAMBLINGㅤ

Another bot I made sleepily! (The best ideas come to me when I'm sleepy, lol). I had more ideas for bots, but I didn't do them because I was editing my profile (by the way, what do you think? It took me four days and there are still some details missing).

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

I thought about opening requests, but I'm not really sure. For one thing, I don't know how to create a Google Form (although that's the least of it, I can learn). What worries me most is making a mistake with an order or doing it wrong, because sometimes I have a hard time understanding things and I don't want to disappoint anyone... But, my silly frustrations aside, would you all like me to open requests?

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Anyway, I hope you enjoy using the bot!

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
